nodes.name: Zhejiang Chemical Plant CFB Boiler
nodes.description: Coal-fired CFB boiler providing process steam

nodes.name: Atmosphere
nodes.description: Atmospheric air — source for primary and secondary combustion air

nodes.name: Coal Feed System
nodes.description: Coal fuel feed to furnace combustion zone

nodes.name: Feedwater Supply
nodes.description: Boiler feedwater supply from deaerator/condensate system

nodes.name: Desuperheating Water Supply
nodes.description: Cooling water supply for steam desuperheating injection

nodes.name: Primary Air System
nodes.description: Supplies and preheats primary combustion air to fluidize the bed

nodes.name: Secondary Air System
nodes.description: Supplies and preheats secondary combustion air for staged combustion

nodes.name: Combustion System
nodes.description: Coal combustion in the CFB furnace — generates heat for steam production

nodes.name: Flue Gas & Heat Recovery System
nodes.description: Captures heat from flue gas via cyclone separators and economizer

nodes.name: Draft & Exhaust System
nodes.description: Maintains furnace negative pressure and exhausts flue gas to atmosphere

nodes.name: Steam Generation & Superheating System
nodes.description: Converts feedwater to superheated steam via drum, superheaters, and desuperheater

nodes.name: Primary Fan
nodes.description: Supplies primary combustion air to fluidize the bed and support lower-furnace combustion

nodes.name: Primary Air Preheater
nodes.description: Heat exchanger using flue gas waste heat to preheat primary combustion air

nodes.name: Furnace Lower Hearth / Bed Zone
nodes.description: Lower furnace combustion zone where coal combusts in the fluidized bed; hot solids recirculate back here from cyclones

nodes.name: Return Air Chamber (Left)
nodes.description: Left-side return air chamber — recirculates transport air through the left solid return leg

nodes.name: Return Air Chamber (Right)
nodes.description: Right-side return air chamber — recirculates transport air through the right solid return leg

nodes.name: Secondary Fan
nodes.description: Supplies secondary combustion air to upper furnace for staged combustion

nodes.name: Secondary Air Preheater
nodes.description: Heat exchanger using flue gas waste heat to preheat secondary combustion air

nodes.name: Furnace Chamber (Upper)
nodes.description: Upper furnace combustion zone; hot flue gas and entrained solids exit here to cyclone separators

nodes.name: Cyclone Separator (Left)
nodes.description: Left cyclone separator — separates entrained solids from flue gas; solids return to furnace via CFB loop

nodes.name: Cyclone Separator (Right)
nodes.description: Right cyclone separator — separates entrained solids from flue gas; solids return to furnace via CFB loop

nodes.name: Upper Economizer
nodes.description: Counterflow heat exchanger recovering heat from flue gas to preheat boiler feedwater

nodes.name: Induced Draft Fan
nodes.description: Pulls flue gas through the boiler to maintain negative furnace pressure; critical for safe operation

nodes.name: Stack / Chimney
nodes.description: Final exhaust stack discharging cleaned flue gas to atmosphere

nodes.name: Steam Drum
nodes.description: Separates saturated steam from water; provides water inventory buffer

nodes.name: Low Temperature Superheater
nodes.description: First-stage superheater; raises saturated steam temperature above saturation point

nodes.name: Primary Desuperheater
nodes.description: Injects cooling water into steam to control final steam temperature; TV_8329ZC valve modulates water flow

nodes.name: High Temperature Superheater
nodes.description: Final-stage superheater; brings steam to target outlet temperature

nodes.name: Steam Outlet
nodes.description: Final steam outlet — TE_8332A (primary KPI, 530-545 degC) is measured here

nodes.name: Steam Outlet Temperature
nodes.description: Final superheated steam temperature — PRIMARY KPI

nodes.name: Upper Furnace Pressure
nodes.description: Furnace chamber pressure (negative = induced draft operating correctly)

nodes.name: Upper Furnace Temperature
nodes.description: Temperature in the upper furnace combustion zone

nodes.name: Hearth Differential Pressure
nodes.description: Upper/lower hearth differential pressure — indicates bed inventory and solid loading

nodes.name: Steam Drum Pressure
nodes.description: Steam drum operating pressure — determines saturation temperature

nodes.name: Outlet Steam Pressure
nodes.description: Final steam pressure at boiler outlet

nodes.name: Flue Gas Oxygen Content
nodes.description: Residual O2 in flue gas at economizer inlet — indicates combustion excess air ratio

nodes.name: Economizer Outlet Flue Gas Temperature
nodes.description: Flue gas temperature after economizer — indicates heat recovery efficiency

nodes.name: Main Steam Flow
nodes.description: Compensated main steam mass flow rate — primary load indicator

nodes.name: Desuperheating Water Flow
nodes.description: Cooling water injection flow for steam temperature control

nodes.name: Steam Temperature Control Loop
nodes.control_action: Opens TV_8329ZC to increase YJJWSLL water flow when TE_8332A is high
nodes.description: Maintains boiler outlet steam temperature within 530-545 degC

nodes.name: Furnace Draft Control Loop
nodes.control_action: Increases IDF fan speed when furnace pressure rises toward zero
nodes.description: Maintains negative furnace pressure by controlling induced draft fan speed

nodes.name: Combustion Air / O2 Trim Control Loop
nodes.control_action: Adjusts primary and secondary fan speeds to hit O2 setpoint
nodes.description: Optimizes combustion efficiency by trimming air flows to maintain target flue gas O2

nodes.name: Normal Operation
nodes.description: Boiler operating within design parameters

nodes.name: Abnormal - High Steam Temp
nodes.description: Steam temperature above normal range; investigate combustion and desuperheater

nodes.name: Abnormal - Low Steam Temp
nodes.description: Steam temperature below normal range; investigate combustion air, load, and steam flow

stream_descriptions.PrimaryAir: Primary combustion air: atmosphere -> primary fan -> preheater -> lower furnace bed
stream_descriptions.SecondaryAir: Secondary combustion air: atmosphere -> secondary fan -> preheater -> upper furnace
stream_descriptions.ReturnAir: Return air recirculation: lower hearth <-> return air chambers (solid transport air)
stream_descriptions.FlueGas: Flue gas exhaust: furnace -> cyclone separators -> economizer -> induced draft fan -> chimney
stream_descriptions.Solids: CFB solid recirculation loop: cyclone separators -> furnace lower hearth (defines CFB operation)
stream_descriptions.FeedWater: Feedwater heating: feedwater supply -> economizer -> steam drum
stream_descriptions.Steam: Steam superheating: steam drum -> low-temp SH -> desuperheater -> high-temp SH -> outlet
stream_descriptions.DesuperheatingWater: Desuperheating cooling water: cooling supply -> primary desuperheater injection
stream_descriptions.Coal: Coal fuel feed: coal feeder -> furnace lower hearth
